basic_details.job_title: ESIC Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC), Regional Office – Telangana
basic_details.short_information: ESIC is inviting applications for empanelment of 19 Advocates for various courts in Telangana.

qualification.details: Advocates must be practicing and registered with Bar Council of India / State Bar Council. Detailed eligibility, experience required, and terms & conditions are given in Annexure-I of the notification.

how_to_apply: Interested advocates fulfilling the eligibility criteria may submit their applications in the prescribed format (Annexure-II or Annexure-III) along with all supporting documents. The application must be sent by post to the address below, super-scribing the envelope with the specific court name.
Address: Regional Director (Legal), Employees’ State Insurance Corporation, Regional Office- Telangana, Hill Fort Road, Adarsh Nagar, Hyderabad, Telangana-500063
important_instructions: Existing panel advocates shall cease to be on the panel after finalization of the new panel and must apply afresh. Application for empanelment does not confer any right of empanelment. ESIC reserves the right to reject any application or cancel the entire process without assigning any reason. Selected advocates will be informed separately. Full terms, fee schedule, and duties are available in the official notification.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ESIC Advocate Empanelment Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ESIC Advocate Empanelment Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Telangana Advocate Empanelment 2026-29 Overview
content_sections.text: ESIC is inviting applications for empanelment of 19 Advocates for various courts in Telangana.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: ESIC Telangana Advocate Vacancy Details 2026-29
content_sections.text: ESIC has announced 19 vacancies for empanelment of Advocates. Existing panel advocates must also apply afresh.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Advocate Empanelment 2026-29 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Advocates must be practicing and registered with Bar Council of India / State Bar Council. Detailed eligibility, experience required, and terms & conditions are given in Annexure-I of the notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Telangana Advocate Empanelment 2026-29
content_sections.text: Interested advocates fulfilling the eligibility criteria may submit their applications in the prescribed format (Annexure-II or Annexure-III) along with all supporting documents. The application must be sent by post to the address below, super-scribing the envelope with the specific court name. Address: Regional Director (Legal), Employees’ State Insurance Corporation, Regional Office- Telangana, Hill Fort Road, Adarsh Nagar, Hyderabad, Telangana-500063 Last Date: 14th August 2026 (till 1700 hours)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ESIC Advocate Empanelment
content_sections.text: Existing panel advocates shall cease to be on the panel after finalization of the new panel and must apply afresh. Application for empanelment does not confer any right of empanelment. ESIC reserves the right to reject any application or cancel the entire process without assigning any reason. Selected advocates will be informed separately. Full terms, fee schedule, and duties are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Telangana Advocate Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 14th August 2026 till 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ESIC Advocate Empanelment Telangana 2026-29?
faq.answer: Total 19 vacancies – 6 in High Court, 3 in CAT, 8 in EI Court, and 2 in MM Court.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for ESIC Advocate Panel Telangana?
faq.answer: Practicing Advocates registered with Bar Council of India or State Bar Council who meet the eligibility and experience criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ESIC Advocate Empanelment?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should refer to the detailed advertisement

faq.question: Q5. Where to send the application for ESIC Telangana Advocate Empanelment?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to the Regional Director (Legal), ESIC Regional Office Telangana, Hill Fort Road, Adarsh Nagar, Hyderabad – 500063.

faq.question: Q6. Do existing ESIC panel advocates need to apply again?
faq.answer: Yes, all existing panel advocates must apply afresh for the new panel 2026-29.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the ESIC Advocate Empanelment Notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification and application format are available on https://rotelangana.esic.gov.in/recruitments/rosro_recruitment_list.
